options.prompt: Run a single instruction in command mode
options.displayLanguage: Set display language (e.g., en, id, zh-cn, fr, de)
options.autoSkill: Auto-generate skills based on project analysis
options.permissions: Display current permission settings and exit
options.login: Sign in to your Autohand account
options.logout: Sign out of your Autohand account
options.patch: Generate git patch without applying changes
options.noWorktree: Disable git worktree isolation in auto-mode
options.addDir: Add additional directories to workspace scope
options.yolo: Auto-approve tool calls matching pattern (e.g., allow:read,write or deny:delete)
options.timeout: Timeout in seconds for auto-approve mode

welcome.subtitle: Your super fast AI coding agent
welcome.updateAvailable: Update available: {{current}} -> {{latest}}. Run 'npm i -g autohand' to update.

tips.title: To get started, describe a task or try one of these commands:
tips.init: /init - create an AGENTS.md file with instructions for Autohand

tips.title: Tips:
tips.mention: Type @ to mention files for the AI
tips.arrows: Use arrow keys to navigate file suggestions
tips.tab: Press Tab to autocomplete file paths
tips.escape: Press Esc to cancel current operation

about.title: Autohand
about.subtitle: Autonomous AI-powered coding agent

clear.description: clear conversation with automatic memory extraction

ui.autoConfirmDesc: Skip confirmation prompts for tool actions
ui.silentToolOutputDesc: Hide tool output blocks in the terminal while preserving model context
ui.checkForUpdatesDesc: Check for CLI updates on startup
ui.showCompletionNotificationDesc: Show OS notification when work completes
ui.completionReportEnabledDesc: Ask the model to summarize completed action turns
ui.activityVerbsEnabledDesc: Show rotating activity verbs while the agent is working

agent.idleLogoutEnabledDesc: Log out authenticated sessions after the idle timeout

permissions.rememberSessionDesc: Remember permission choices for this session

telemetry.declined: No problem! You can change this anytime in config.

registration.title: Autohand Account
registration.description: Create a free Autohand account to unlock cloud sync, team features, and usage analytics.
registration.descriptionMandatory: An Autohand account is required to use Autohand. Sign up for free with Google, GitHub, or email.
registration.prompt: Create an Autohand account? (Sign up with Google, GitHub, or email)
registration.retryPrompt: Would you like to try again?
registration.skipped: You can create an account later with /login
registration.tryLater: You can try again later with /login
registration.visit: To sign up or sign in, visit:
registration.browserOpened: Browser opened. Complete the sign up in your browser.
registration.openManually: Could not open browser automatically. Please visit the URL above.
registration.waiting: Waiting for authorization... (Press Ctrl+C to cancel)

errors.unsafeDirectory: Unsafe directory: {{path}}. Cannot operate in system directories.
errors.noProviderConfigured: No provider is configured yet. Run setup with: autohand --setup
errors.rateLimited: Rate limited. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.timeout: Request timed out. Please try again.
errors.contextTooLong: Context too long. Try /new to start fresh or /undo to remove recent turns.
errors.authFailed: Authentication failed. Check your API key.
errors.paymentRequired: Payment required. Check your account balance.
errors.serverError: Server error. Please try again later.

openaiAuth.apiKeyDescription: Pay-per-use billing with your OpenAI API key
openaiAuth.chatgptDescription: Use your ChatGPT subscription with OpenAI sign-in
openaiAuth.browserPrompt: Finish OpenAI sign-in in your browser:
openaiAuth.browserOpened: Browser opened. Complete the sign-in to continue.
openaiAuth.openManually: Could not open your browser automatically. Visit the URL above.
openaiAuth.waiting: Waiting for the browser sign-in to finish...
openaiAuth.devicePrompt: Sign in with your OpenAI account to continue:

hints.openrouter: Cloud - Access to 100+ models (Claude, GPT-4, etc.)
hints.openai: Cloud - Official OpenAI models (GPT-4o, o1, etc.)
hints.ollama: Local - Run models on your machine (free)
hints.llamacpp: Local - Fast inference with GGUF models
hints.mlx: Local - Optimized for Apple Silicon Macs
hints.llmgateway: Cloud - Unified API for multiple LLM providers
hints.zai: Cloud - Z.ai GLM models (glm-4.5, cogview, etc.)
hints.vertexai: Cloud - Google Cloud Vertex AI (Gemini, Claude, GLM models)
hints.xai: Cloud - xAI Grok models with web search, X search, and code execution
hints.cerebras: Cloud - Cerebras AI with GLM and Qwen models
hints.nvidia: Cloud - NVIDIA NIM models (Llama, Phi, Gemma, Mixtral, etc.)
hints.deepseek: Cloud - DeepSeek API models (V4 Flash, V4 Pro, reasoning)
hints.bedrock: Cloud - AWS Bedrock enterprise models and OpenAI-compatible endpoints

vertexai.title: Google Cloud Vertex AI Configuration
vertexai.getStarted: Connect to Google Cloud Vertex AI for access to Gemini, Claude, and other models

setupSteps.title: Before you begin, make sure you have:
setupSteps.step1: 1. A Google Cloud project with Vertex AI API enabled

vertexai.enterProjectId: Enter your Google Cloud Project ID
vertexai.authTokenHint: You can generate an auth token using the gcloud CLI:
vertexai.enterAuthToken: Enter your Google Cloud auth token
vertexai.enterModel: Enter the model ID (e.g., zai-org/glm-5-maas, google/gemini-1.5-pro)

xai.title: xAI (Grok) Configuration
xai.enterModel: Enter the model ID (e.g., grok-4.20-reasoning, grok-4-1-fast-reasoning)

bedrock.title: AWS Bedrock Configuration
bedrock.getStarted: Connect to AWS Bedrock using Converse or Bedrock OpenAI-compatible inference endpoints.
bedrock.awsCredentialsHint: For Converse, use AWS credential-chain auth: aws configure sso, AWS_PROFILE, IAM role, container credentials, or instance metadata.
bedrock.modelAccessHint: Enable model access for the selected model in the AWS Bedrock console before using it.
bedrock.apiKeyHint: Bedrock API keys are only for Bedrock OpenAI-compatible endpoints. They are not OpenAI API keys.
bedrock.modeConverseHint: Bedrock-native API and the default enterprise mode.
bedrock.modeOpenAIChatHint: OpenAI-compatible chat endpoint for migration paths.
bedrock.modeOpenAIResponsesHint: OpenAI-compatible Responses endpoint for migration paths.
bedrock.authAwsCredentialsHint: Use the AWS SDK credential chain; Autohand does not store AWS access keys.
bedrock.authBedrockApiKeyHint: Store a Bedrock API key for OpenAI-compatible Bedrock endpoints.

azure.title: Azure OpenAI Configuration

setupSteps.title: Before you begin, make sure you have:
setupSteps.step1: 1. An Azure account with an active subscription
setupSteps.step2: 2. An Azure OpenAI resource created at https://ai.azure.com
setupSteps.step3: 3. At least one model deployed (e.g. gpt-4o) in Deployments
setupSteps.step4: 4. Your endpoint URL and API key from Keys and Endpoint page

azure.apiKeyLocation: Find your key in Azure Portal > Your Resource > Keys and Endpoint
azure.entraIdDescription: Entra ID uses OAuth2 client credentials. Create an App Registration in Azure Portal.
azure.managedIdentityDescription: Managed Identity will be used automatically when running inside Azure.
azure.endpointChoice: How do you want to specify your Azure endpoint?
azure.endpointUrlHint: Paste your endpoint URL from Azure Portal > Endpoints and keys
azure.enterEndpointOrResource: Enter your Azure endpoint URL or resource name
azure.deploymentHint: Find your deployment under Azure AI Foundry > Deployments (e.g. gpt-4o, gpt-4o-mini)
azure.deploymentNotUrl: This is NOT a URL — it's the short name of your deployed model.
azure.deploymentUrlError: That looks like a URL, not a deployment name.
azure.deploymentUrlErrorHint: The deployment name is a short name like "gpt-4o" or "gpt-4o-mini".
azure.deploymentUrlErrorLocation: Find it in Azure AI Foundry > your project > Deployments.
azure.enterFullEndpointUrl: Enter your full Azure endpoint URL
azure.deploymentChangeHint: Enter the name of your deployed model from Azure AI Foundry > Deployments
azure.deploymentChangeExample: e.g. gpt-4o, gpt-4o-mini, gpt-4-turbo (NOT a URL)
